_publications._publicationTitle: Insertional Mutagenesis Identifies a STAT3/Arid1b/β-catenin Pathway Driving Neurofibroma Initiation.

_contextSnippet: Neurofibroma like lesions were detected in 7 of 8 nu/nu mice that were subcutaneously transplanted with Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre mice derived sphere cells, while no lesion was detected in Stat3 fl/fl;Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre derived sphere cells
details: Neurofibroma-like lesions detected in 7 of 8 mice transplanted with Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre sphere cells, while no lesions detected with Stat3 fl/fl;Nf1 fl/fl;DhhCre sphere cells
